zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth de Gatton於大約1290年出生在英國素瑞加頓時，她的父親Hamo de Gatton IV28歲，母親Lady Marjory of Kent25歲。她於大約1327年與Sir William Denne在英國肯特結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1352年在英國肯特金斯頓享年63歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth de Gatton于大约1290年出生在英国素瑞加頓时，她的父亲Hamo de Gatton IV28岁，母亲Lady Marjory of Kent25岁。她于大约1327年与Sir William Denne在英国肯特结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1352年在英国肯特金斯頓享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: Gatton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Sussex and Surrey): habitational name for someone from a place in Surrey so named, from Old English gāt ‘goat’ + tūn ‘enclosure’.

variants.name: Gatten
meanings: English: variant of   Gatton  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth de Gatton was born about 1290, in Gatton, Surrey, England, her father, Hamo de Gatton IV, was 28 and her mother, Lady Marjory of Kent, was 25. She married Sir William Denne about 1327, in Kent, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 6 daughters. She died in 1352, in Kingston, Kent, England, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth de Gatton est née environ 1290, à Gatton, Surrey, Angleterre, son père, Hamo de Gatton IV, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Lady Marjory of Kent, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Denne environ 1327, à Kent, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée en 1352, à Kingston, Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth de Gatton um 1290 in Gatton, Surrey, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hamo de Gatton IV 28 und ihre Mutter Lady Marjory of Kent 25. Sie hat um 1327 in Kent, England Sir William Denne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb 1352 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Kingston, Kent, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth de Gatton è nata il circa 1290 nel Gatton, Surrey, England, sua padre, Hamo de Gatton IV, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Lady Marjory of Kent, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Sir William Denne circa 1327, nel Kent, England. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 6 figlie. Morì nel 1352, nel Kingston, Kent, England, all'età di 63 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth de Gattonが約1290年にイギリススリーガットオンで生まれた時，父Hamo de Gatton IVは28歳，母Lady Marjory of Kentは25歳であった。約1327年にイギリスケントでSir William Denneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1352年にイギリスケントキングストンで63歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth de Gatton(이)가 대략 1290년 영국 수리 가턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hamo de Gatton IV(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Marjory of Kent(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 대략 1327년 영국 켄트에서 Sir William Denne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1352년 영국 켄트 킨그스턴에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth de Gatton nasceu aproximadamente 1290, em Gatton, Surrey, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hamo de Gatton IV, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Lady Marjory of Kent, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William Denne aproximadamente 1327, em Kent, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1352, em Kingston, Kent, Inglaterra, com 63 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth de Gatton родилась около 1290 г. в местности гаттон, сурри, Англия, её отцу по имени Hamo de Gatton IV было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Marjory of Kent, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Denne около 1327 г. в местности кэнт, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Она умерла в 1352 г. в местности кингстон, кэнт, Англия в возрасте 63 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth de Gatton nació aproximadamente 1290, en Gatton, Surrey, Inglaterra, su papá, Hamo de Gatton IV, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Lady Marjory of Kent, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Sir William Denne aproximadamente 1327, en Kent, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió en 1352, en Kingston, Kent, Inglaterra, a la edad de 63 años.
